svg.title: Lumen architecture
svg.desc: API and Local both connect to AppService. cli connects only to Local. Session manager is added above API as a sub-component. AppService connects to DataContainer, DataPipeline, DataLoader and DatasetDownloader along the main spine. AppService also branches down to BayesianScorer, DataFilter, Validator, and StateStore. The db/ module sits below the main diagram and owns four tables: SessionManager connects down to both the REFRESH_TOKEN table and the USERS table, DataLoader connects down to the CONTENT table, and StateStore connects down to the PREVIOUS_DATA table. Each connector is routed so it does not cross any other connector, arrow, or label.
svg.text: db/ — engine and ORM. SessionManager owns REFRESH_TOKEN and USERS; DataLoader owns CONTENT; StateStore owns PREVIOUS_DATA.
